analysis_commentary: 3000s window extended +300s but end-of-run candidate probe shows max_prob=1.0, legal_mass_sum=0, top100_sum=1 — sustained saturation matching two of three full-collapse signals. top1_legal_ever_positive=true spares the literal full-collapse trigger, but end-of-run health regressed sharply vs baseline (max 0.150, legal_mass 0.322). 5 arenas, 0 promotions, mean 0.511. Trajectory top1_legal collapsed 0.125→0.023.
